mapper.insert: insert into internship_application (student_id, position_id, company_id, status, viewed, skills, experience, self_evaluation, apply_time, view_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{studentId}, #{positionId}, #{companyId}, #{status}, #{viewed}, #{skills}, #{experience}, #{selfEvaluation}, #{applyTime}, #{viewTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT ia.*, su.name AS student_name, su.student_user_id, su.gender, su.grade, '广东医科大学' AS school, '本科' AS education, m.name AS major, su.phone, su.email, p.position_name FROM internship_application ia LEFT JOIN student_users su ON ia.student_id = su.id LEFT JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN position p ON ia.position_id = p.id WHERE ia.company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY ia.apply_time DESC
select * from internship_application where position_id = #{positionId} order by apply_time desc
select * from internship_application where student_id = #{studentId} order by apply_time desc
select * from internship_application where status = #{status} order by apply_time desc
select * from internship_application where company_id = #{companyId} and status = #{status} order by apply_time desc
mapper.update: update internship_application set status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
update internship_application set viewed = #{viewed}, view_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from internship_application order by apply_time desc
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internship_application WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internship_application WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status = #{status}
